item.title: CFTC Charges Army Soldier in First Prediction Market Insider Trading Case
item.description: Misappropriation of classified information to trade event contracts.

item.title: CFTC Charges Software Engineer with Misappropriation in Event Contract Scheme
item.description: Used confidential employer data to trade prediction market event contracts.

item.title: CFTC Issues Staff Advisory on Prediction Market Surveillance Obligations
item.description: Guidance for DCMs on event contract surveillance.

item.title: CFTC Charges Firm with Swap Data Reporting Violations
item.description: Failure to report swap transaction data to a registered repository.
